itemListElement.reviewBody:
My own experience in BOTHIMARAM PLAY SCHOOL,the teachers are caring attentive and skilled in the understanding  the needs of young childs,the school premises are clean and safe the activities keep the children engaged and happy ,the teachers is approachable and always ready to address any concern
Overall I highly recommend BOTHIMARAM PLAY SCHOOL to any parent looking for a quality pre school that priorities the growth and well being of their child .

itemListElement.reviewBody: I have joined my kiddo with 1.6years with full of fear, but athe care has been provided in bodhi is tremendous. She loves to be there even for whole day. Her behaviour changes on potty training, speech evidence that it is the best ever choice we as a parents made for her. She feels like home.

itemListElement.reviewBody: "I'm delighted to share my experience. My daughter attended this play school for one and a half years, and I strongly recommend it for its peaceful environment, which is ideal for young children. The teachers are highly dedicated to their work."

itemReviewed.name: Bodhi Maram Play School & Day Care - Vellalore

itemListElement.reviewBody:
My heartfelt thanks and appreciation to Bodhi Maram play school team. You do a fabulous job in nurturing the kid's future.
I understood on our face to face discussion about how you monitor and observe each children and provide honest opinions for child's betterment and open for feedback from parent's side as well. Really glad that my son is part of Bodhi Maram. Keep up your fantabulous work!!!!

itemReviewed.name: Bodhi Maram Play School & Day Care - Vellalore

itemListElement.reviewBody: It is a safe and positive place for our kids. The Teachers are so convenient to be approached. I would suggest like this type of school is the best for our kids during the beginning stage.

itemReviewed.name: Bodhi Maram Play School & Day Care - Vellalore

itemListElement.reviewBody: Highly recommended pre school..! Exceptional care, nurturing environment and engaging activities. Staffs and care takers are too good.. Great communication with parents, providing regular updates and feedback. Really wonderful and appreciated for their efforts and the way they  treating the children to improve themselves. Overall a wonderful place for the children to learn and grow...Happy parent of "BODHI MARAM"..!!!!!

itemReviewed.name: Bodhi Maram Play School & Day Care - Vellalore

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Bodhimaram has a very good team of talented and dedicated teachers who focuses more on childrens care and development
Friendly atmosphere for childrens. School often conduct competition which involves both parents and children participation and it helps children get more involved towards the subject.

itemReviewed.name: Bodhi Maram Play School & Day Care - Vellalore

itemListElement.reviewBody:
One of the best play schools in Coimbatore.
We had a wonderful experience with Bodhi Maram Play School. The teachers are incredibly caring and patient, providing a safe and nurturing environment for the children. Our son loves going to school every day, thanks to the fun and engaging activities that support both learning and social development. The school also maintains high standards of cleanliness and safety. We highly recommend Bodhi Maram Play School for parents looking for a reliable and loving place for their little ones.
